# airtelcloud_lb_certificate (Resource)

Manages an SSL certificate for an Airtel Cloud Load Balancer Service. Certificates are immutable; any change requires replacement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `lb_service_id` (String) The ID of the parent LB service.
- `name` (String) The name of the certificate.
- `ssl_cert` (String, Sensitive) The SSL certificate in PEM format.
- `ssl_private_key` (String, Sensitive) The SSL private key in PEM format.

### Optional

- `ca_cert` (String, Sensitive) The CA certificate in PEM format.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the certificate.
- `status` (String) The current status of the certificate.
